summary: Iteration 25: Free vs Pro Monetization Controls Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 10/10 tests PASSED. Frontend: All upgrade modals now working correctly after fix. Key Manager, Instances Panel, and Pricing page all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/v1/hub/instances correctly enforces max_instances=3 and per_model_instance_cap=2 with 403
Backend /api/v1/hub/runs correctly enforces max_personas=3 stages with 403
Backend /api/payments/summary returns correct free tier limits (instances:3, personas:3, keys:1, runs:100)
Frontend KeyManager.jsx correctly shows UpgradeToProModal when second key is attempted
Frontend PricingPageV2.jsx correctly displays free tier limits and Pro unlimited messaging
Frontend HubInstancesPanel.jsx now correctly shows UpgradeToProModal when instance limit is hit

test_credentials.note: Fresh users registered for each test session via /api/auth/register

seed_data_creation: Test instances created during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 tested and FIXED Free vs Pro monetization controls. All backend APIs correctly enforce limits with 403 status codes. Frontend now correctly shows UpgradeToProModal for: (1) Instance limit when creating 3rd instance with same model (per_model_instance_cap=2), (2) Key Manager when adding second BYOK key. PricingPageV2 shows correct free tier limits. Fixed CORS issue where 403 response body was not readable - now frontend handles 403 with empty body by showing generic upgrade message.

details.test_create_instances_up_to_free_limit: PASS - Can create instances up to limit
details.test_instance_limit_enforced_with_403: PASS - Instance blocked with 403 when limit hit
details.test_run_with_more_than_3_stages_returns: PASS - Run with 4 stages blocked with 403
details.test_second_key_blocked_with_403: PASS - Second BYOK key blocked with 403
details.test_free_tier_has_correct_limits: PASS - All free tier limits verified

details.pricing_page_free_tier_card: PASS - Shows 'Max 3 active agents', 'Max 3 saved personas', 'Max 1 connected BYOK key'
details.pricing_page_pro_unlimited: PASS - Pro packages show 'Unlimited agents and personas', 'Unlimited runs', 'Unlimited connected keys'
details.key_manager_first_key: PASS - First BYOK key saved successfully
details.key_manager_second_key_modal: PASS - UpgradeToProModal appears with 'Connected key limit reached' title
details.key_manager_modal_content: PASS - Modal shows correct description and buttons
details.instances_panel_form: PASS - Instance form found with all fields
details.instances_panel_limit_modal: PASS - UpgradeToProModal appears with 'Instance limit reached' title when limit hit

features_verified: Backend: /api/payments/summary returns correct free tier limits
Backend: /api/v1/hub/runs enforces max persona stages=3 with 403
Frontend: PricingPageV2 shows correct free tier limits
Frontend: PricingPageV2 shows Pro unlimited agents/personas/runs/keys
Frontend: KeyManager shows UpgradeToProModal when second key attempted
Frontend: HubInstancesPanel shows UpgradeToProModal when instance limit hit
Frontend: Upgrade modal has correct title, description, counter, and CTA buttons

mocked_apis.details: Stripe test-mode/local mocked behavior (not in scope for this run)

issue_1.description: HubInstancesPanel upgrade modal not appearing when instance limit hit
issue_1.root_cause: CORS issue - browser not exposing 403 response body for cross-origin requests with credentials
issue_1.fix: Updated hubApi.js to detect 403 with empty body and return generic 'Free tier limit reached' message. Updated HubInstancesPanel.jsx to detect 'limit' and 'upgrade' keywords in error message.

issue_2.fix: Added expose_headers=['*'] to CORSMiddleware in server.py
